title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Original Series Soundtrack is now available on Amazon Apple Music Google Play and Spotify
display_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Original Series Soundtrack is now available on Amazon Apple Music Google Play and Spotify
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion (Original Series Soundtrack) is now available on Amazon, Apple Music, Google Play, and Spotify             Quote Post by JB2448 » Fri Jun 21, 2019 9:01 am https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07SWHW4PM https://music.apple.com/album/1467210433 https://play.google.com/store/music/alb ... so6h6hwf2a https://open.spotify.com/album/0dAQHi4MnkvagbLKQHZdOI As of this post, it's $10 at its standard list price, with a discounted price of $9.49 on Amazon. This is in USD. Quoting myself from the Netflix general release thread: JB2448 wrote: Now this is interesting. A new official English release of the series soundtrack has been made available on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/0dAQHi4MnkvagbLKQHZdOI What's especially interesting to me concerning this is that the instrumental and Yoko Takahashi versions of "Fly Me to the Moon" are present, but not the iconic one by Claire Littley. Is it possible that Milan Entertainment Inc. (who licensed the score from King Record Co. Ltd. for the international Netflix release) couldn't secure the rights to Claire's performance of the song from King Records?

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion (Original Series Soundtrack) is now available on Amazon, Apple Music, Google Play, and Spoti             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Fri Jun 21, 2019 9:38 am It's incomplete without Komm Susser Tod.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion (Original Series Soundtrack) is now available on Amazon, Apple Music, Google Play, and Spoti             Quote Post by JB2448 » Fri Jun 21, 2019 9:43 am Tumbling Down wrote: It's incomplete without Komm Susser Tod.
